title: Success criteria from workshop
document: The success criteria are reducing manual account research by 40%, improving rep prep time, and proving handoff approvals before any CRM writeback.

context_entries.title: Reduce manual account research by 40%
context_entries.body: The workshop defined success as reducing manual account research by 40% and improving rep prep time.

context_entries.title: Writeback approvals are part of success criteria
context_entries.body: The customer wants to prove handoff approvals before CRM writeback.

structured_data.fact: handoff approvals required before CRM writeback

evidence.snippet: proving handoff approvals before any CRM writeback

title: New opportunity hinted under a known account
